rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FRANK H. LEEDS AND MABEL CHAVEZ LEEDS REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Order For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Petitioner Frank Leeds' Motion to Enforce the Settlement Agreement is GRANTED. Objectors David Leeds and Victoria Leeds have failed to comply with completing the 1031 Exchange, including failing to execute any and all documents reasonably necessary to complete the exchange, in violation of the Settlement Agreement and Mutual Release, dated August 28, 2019, and the First Amendment to Settlement Agreement and Mutual Release, dated December 22, 2020. Victoria and David Leeds shall take all steps necessary to execute the 1031 exchange documents in accordance with the settlement agreement, as amended, within 30 days of entry of this Order. Petitioner's request for attorney fees pursuant to the settlement agreements is GRANTED in the amount of $2,769. Petitioner Frank Leeds shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling as published above. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
